description: You are a Database Administrator. A junior colleague restored the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_corrupt.db) using the wrong character encoding, resulting in 'Mojibake' artifacts. Using the 'ChinookRepair' connection in DBeaver, repair the 'artists', 'tracks', 'customers', and 'employees' tables by replacing the following artifacts: 'Ã©' with 'é', 'Ã¡' with 'á', 'Ã£' with 'ã', 'Ã³' with 'ó', 'Ã¶' with 'ö', 'Ã§' with 'ç', and 'Ã¼' with 'ü'. Use SQL UPDATE statements with REPLACE functions without deleting any rows. Save the repair script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/fix_encoding.sql and export a CSV summary report containing the names of the repaired tables to /home/ga/Documents/exports/repair_summary.csv.
